    Description

    WritableBeanStore.addBean(Class<T> beanType, T bean)
    Adds an unnamed bean of the specified type to this store.

    Adds a named bean of the specified type to this store.

    <T> WritableBeanStore
    WritableBeanStore.addBeanType(Class<T> beanType, Class<? extends T> implType)
    Registers a default implementation class for the specified bean type.
    <T> WritableBeanStore
    WritableBeanStore.addDefaultSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> supplier)
    Adds a fallback supplier for an unnamed bean of the specified type to this store.
    <T> WritableBeanStore
    WritableBeanStore.addDefaultSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> supplier, String name)
    Adds a fallback supplier for a named bean of the specified type to this store.
    <T> WritableBeanStore
    WritableBeanStore.addSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> supplier)
    Adds a supplier for an unnamed bean of the specified type to this store.
    <T> WritableBeanStore
    WritableBeanStore.addSupplier(Class<T> beanType, Supplier<T> supplier, String name)
    Adds a supplier for a named bean of the specified type to this store.
    WritableBeanStore
    WritableBeanStore.clear()
    Removes all beans from this store.
    WritableBeanStore

    WritableBeanStore
    WritableBeanStore.registerConfiguration(Class<?> configType)
    Registers a configuration class and its Bean-annotated members.
    default WritableBeanStore
    WritableBeanStore.registerConfigurations(Class<?>... configTypes)
    Registers multiple configuration classes.

    Description
    JuneauBeanStoreExtension
    JuneauBeanStoreExtension.attach(WritableBeanStore store)
    Points this extension at a long-lived SUT's WritableBeanStore for Mode OVERLAY push/pop wiring.
